title: Software Engineer
summary: We are looking for a passionate software engineer with experience in web development and modern JavaScript frameworks, preferably React and Node.js. The perfect candidate must be a team player and have great communication skills.

title: Data Analyst
summary: We are looking for a passionate data analyst with experience in data visualization and statistical analysis. The ideal candidate should be proficient in Python and SQL, and have strong problem-solving skills.

title: IOS Developer
summary: We are looking for a passionate iOS developer with experience in Swift and Objective-C. The ideal candidate should have a strong portfolio of iOS applications and be able to work in a fast-paced environment.

title: DevOps Engineer
summary: We are looking for a passionate DevOps engineer with experience in cloud platforms, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and CI/CD pipelines. The ideal candidate should be proficient in automation tools and have strong problem-solving skills.

title: Frontend Developer
summary: We are looking for a frontend developer with strong React skills, a good eye for UI details, and experience working with design systems. Familiarity with TypeScript and modern testing tools is a plus.

title: Backend Engineer
summary: We are looking for a backend engineer to design and maintain scalable APIs in Node.js. Experience with microservices, PostgreSQL, and cloud infrastructure is required.

title: Full Stack Developer
summary: We are looking for a full stack developer with experience building web apps using JavaScript, Node.js, and modern frontend frameworks. You should be comfortable across the stack and enjoy collaborating with product teams.

title: QA Automation Engineer
summary: We are looking for a QA automation engineer with Python experience to build and maintain robust test suites. Familiarity with CI pipelines and API testing is essential.

title: Database Administrator
summary: We are looking for a database administrator with strong PostgreSQL expertise. You will optimize performance, manage backups, and ensure high availability across production systems.

title: UI/UX Designer
summary: We are looking for a UI/UX designer to craft intuitive interfaces and collaborate closely with frontend engineers. A strong portfolio and experience with prototyping tools are required.
